vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque
Mounting flange ISO 9409
Collaborative robot mode, compliant joints, collision absorption, rounded edges
Suggested material: Al 7075 + steel + composite
Process: CNC + LPBF

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion issues due to material mismatch between Al 7075 and steel components.
risk.mit: Use thermal simulation to verify compatibility and adjust material selection if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of cable routing interference during full motion range.
risk.mit: Conduct a thorough cable routing test and ensure sufficient slack loops and strain relief.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex internal features.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly sequence and use alignment tools during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload on critical joints leading to premature wear.
risk.mit: Ensure proper preload and locking mechanisms are in place for all critical joints.

risk.desc: Risk of manufacturing defects in LPBF-printed features.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough inspection using CMM and visual inspection for surface finish.

physics_paths.description: Payload forces are transmitted through the shoulder joint to the shoulder bearing seat.
Heat from the environment and joint operation is dissipated through the shoulder harmonic drive.
Motor torque is transmitted through the shoulder harmonic drive to the output shaft.
Cables from the cable spine route through the shoulder joint's center bore.
Human access for maintenance and inspection is provided through the shoulder service access port.

integration_opportunities.description: Opportunity to integrate a high-precision bearing for the shoulder joint.
Opportunity to integrate a high-reduction harmonic drive gearbox.
Opportunity to route and manage cables through the joint's center bore.

manufacturing_strategy.process: CNC machining for main body, LPBF for complex internal features
manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and axis rings
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: H7/h6 for critical interfaces, LC2 for general fit
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for LPBF, orientation for optimal material properties
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Coordinate measuring machine (CMM) for dimensional accuracy, visual inspection for surface finish

verification_focus.description: Test joint under maximum torque and payload conditions for 10,000 cycles.
Test joint's thermal dissipation under maximum load for 1 hour.
Verify cable routing through the joint's center bore for full motion range.
